emails.subject: Position Manager
emails.body: Position Manager Steve, It looks as if we're going to be trading effective Mon (2/11). I'm looking for some assurance that we'll have at least the basics ready to go with regard to position manager. Can you update? Thanks, Fletch

emails.subject: RE: Position Manager
emails.body: RE: Position Manager Can we meet today to discuss? Thanks, Steve To: Nat, Steve

emails.subject: RE: Position Manager
emails.body: yes. how about 1pm, you name the place. thanks, fletch To: Sturm, Fletcher J.

emails.subject: RE: Position Manager
emails.body: Sounds good... I'll just find you on the floor and we can talk at your desk or grab a room. I have an overall IT update meeting with Lloyd, Stacey, Corry, Thresa, Rika, etc... at 1:30 in ECS05776 that you are also welcome to attend if interested... Thanks, Steve To: Nat, Steve
